Query.SQL: SELECT C.CASE_NUMBER AS "C.CASE_NUMBER", C.CASE_TYPE AS "C.CASE_TYPE", C.INSOLVENCY_NUMBER AS "C.INSOLVENCY_NUMBER", C.STATUS AS "C.STATUS", C.ADMIN_CRT_CODE AS "C.ADMIN_CRT_CODE", CT.NAME AS "CT.NAME", C.CRED_CODE AS "C.CRED_CODE", C.BRIEF_DETAILS_OF_CLAIM AS "C.BRIEF_DETAILS_OF_CLAIM", C.PARTICULARS_OF_CLAIM AS "C.PARTICULARS_OF_CLAIM", C.RECEIPT_DATE AS "C.RECEIPT_DATE", C.AMOUNT_CLAIMED_CURRENCY AS "C.AMOUNT_CLAIMED_CURRENCY", C.AMOUNT_CLAIMED AS "C.AMOUNT_CLAIMED", C.COURT_FEE_CURRENCY AS "C.COURT_FEE_CURRENCY", C.COURT_FEE AS "C.COURT_FEE", C.SOLICITORS_COSTS_CURRENCY AS "C.SOLICITORS_COSTS_CURRENCY", C.SOLICITORS_COSTS AS "C.SOLICITORS_COSTS", C.TOTAL_CURRENCY AS "C.TOTAL_CURRENCY", C.TOTAL AS "C.TOTAL", C.DATE_OF_ISSUE AS "C.DATE_OF_ISSUE", C.TRACK AS "C.TRACK", C.PREF_COURT_CODE AS "C.PREF_COURT_CODE", CT2.NAME AS "CT2.NAME", DECODE(C.PARTICULARS_OF_CLAIM,null,'false','true') AS "PARTICULARS_OF_CLAIM_PRESENT", ( SELECT DECODE(CE1.HRG_SEQ,NULL,'false','true') FROM CASE_EVENTS CE1 WHERE CE1.CASE_NUMBER = C.CASE_NUMBER AND CE1.STD_EVENT_ID = 1) AS "HEARING_PRESENT_AT_CREATION", ( SELECT DECODE(COUNT(*),0,'false','true') FROM OBLIGATIONS OB WHERE OB.CASE_NUMBER = C.CASE_NUMBER AND OB.AE_EVENT_SEQ IS NULL AND DELETE_FLAG = 'N') AS "OB.ACTIVE_OBLIGATIONS", ( SELECT DECODE(COUNT(*),0,'false','true') FROM OBLIGATIONS OB WHERE OB.CASE_NUMBER = C.CASE_NUMBER AND OB.AE_EVENT_SEQ IS NULL AND DELETE_FLAG = 'Y') AS "OB.DELETED_OBLIGATIONS", (SELECT DECODE(COUNT(*),0,'false','true') FROM PAYMENTS WHERE EXISTS ( (SELECT PY.SUBJECT_NO FROM PAYMENTS PY WHERE PY.PAYMENT_FOR = 'CASE' AND PY.SUBJECT_NO = C.CASE_NUMBER) UNION ALL (SELECT PY.SUBJECT_NO FROM PAYMENTS PY, AE_APPLICATIONS A WHERE PY.PAYMENT_FOR = 'AE' AND A.CASE_NUMBER = C.CASE_NUMBER AND PY.SUBJECT_NO = A.AE_NUMBER) UNION ALL (SELECT PY.SUBJECT_NO FROM PAYMENTS PY, WARRANTS W WHERE W.CASE_NUMBER = C.CASE_NUMBER AND PY.PAYMENT_FOR = 'HOME WARRANT' AND PY.SUBJECT_NO = W.WARRANT_NUMBER AND W.LOCAL_WARRANT_NUMBER IS NULL AND PY.ENFORCEMENT_COURT_CODE = W.ISSUED_BY) UNION ALL (SELECT PY.SUBJECT_NO FROM PAYMENTS PY, WARRANTS W WHERE W.CASE_NUMBER = C.CASE_NUMBER AND PY.PAYMENT_FOR = 'FOREIGN WARRANT' AND PY.SUBJECT_NO = W.LOCAL_WARRANT_NUMBER AND PY.ENFORCEMENT_COURT_CODE = W.CURRENTLY_OWNED_BY) )) AS "PY.PAYMENTS_EXIST", ( SELECT REF.RV_IIT_CODE_1 FROM CCBC_REF_CODES REF WHERE REF.RV_LOW_VALUE = C.CASE_TYPE AND (REF.RV_DOMAIN = 'CURRENT_CASE_TYPE' OR REF.RV_DOMAIN = 'CASE_TYPE_OBSOLETE_BY_IIT') ) AS "REF.RV_IIT_CODE_1", ( SELECT REF.RV_IIT_CODE_2 FROM CCBC_REF_CODES REF WHERE REF.RV_LOW_VALUE = C.CASE_TYPE AND (REF.RV_DOMAIN = 'CURRENT_CASE_TYPE' OR REF.RV_DOMAIN = 'CASE_TYPE_OBSOLETE_BY_IIT') ) AS "REF.RV_IIT_CODE_2", 'GA' AS "ADDRESS_TABLE_ALIAS", 'true' AS "TRUE_VALUE", 'N' AS "NO_VALUE", 'EXISTING' AS "EXISTING_VALUE", C.ORA_ROWSCN AS "C_ORA_ROWSCN", CT.ORA_ROWSCN AS "CT_ORA_ROWSCN", CT2.ORA_ROWSCN AS "CT2_ORA_ROWSCN" FROM CASES C, COURTS CT, COURTS CT2 WHERE CT.CODE = C.ADMIN_CRT_CODE AND C.CASE_NUMBER = ${param.caseNumber} AND CT2.CODE (+)= C.PREF_COURT_CODE

Query.Join: H.HRG_SEQ IN (SELECT MAX(H2.HRG_SEQ) FROM HEARINGS H2 WHERE H2.CASE_NUMBER = ${C.CASE_NUMBER} ) AND H.ADDRESS_ID = GA.ADDRESS_ID AND H.CRT_CODE = CT.CODE

Query.SQL: (SELECT SOLP.PARTY_ID AS "SOLP.PARTY_ID" , CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO AS "CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO" , NULL AS "CP.CODE" , GA.ADDRESS_ID AS "GA.ADDRESS_ID" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE1 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE1" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE2 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE2" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE3 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE3" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE4 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE4" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE5 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE5" , GA.POSTCODE AS "GA.POSTCODE" , GA.PARTY_ID AS "GA.PARTY_ID" , SOLP.DX_NUMBER AS "SOLP.DX_NUMBER" , SOLP.TEL_NO AS "SOLP.TEL_NO" , SOLP.FAX_NUMBER AS "SOLP.FAX_NUMBER" , SOLP.EMAIL_ADDRESS AS "SOLP.EMAIL_ADDRESS" , CPR.PREFERRED_COMMUNICATION_METHOD AS "CPR.PREF_COMM_METHOD" , PR.PARTY_ROLE_DESCRIPTION AS "PR.PARTY_ROLE_DESCRIPTION" , CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE AS "CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE" , SOLP.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME AS "SOLP.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME" , DECODE( CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE, null, null, CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE || '_' || CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO) AS "SOL_SURROGATE_ID" , CPR.ORA_ROWSCN AS "CPR_ORA_ROWSCN" , SOLP.ORA_ROWSCN AS "SOLP_ORA_ROWSCN" , NULL AS "CP_ORA_ROWSCN" , PR.ORA_ROWSCN AS "PR_ORA_ROWSCN" , GA.ORA_ROWSCN AS "GA_ORA_ROWSCN" FROM CASE_PARTY_ROLES CPR , PARTIES SOLP , PARTY_ROLES PR , GIVEN_ADDRESSES GA WHERE CPR.CASE_NUMBER = ${C.CASE_NUMBER} AND CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = 'SOLICITOR' AND SOLP.PARTY_ID = CPR.PARTY_ID AND PR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND GA.CASE_NUMBER = ${C.CASE_NUMBER} AND GA.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = 'SOLICITOR' AND GA.CASE_PARTY_NO = CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO AND GA.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE = 'SOLICITOR' ) UNION ALL ( SELECT SOLP.PARTY_ID AS "SOLP.PARTY_ID" , CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO AS "CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO" , CP.CODE AS "CP.CODE" , GA.ADDRESS_ID AS "GA.ADDRESS_ID" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE1 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE1" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE2 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE2" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE3 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE3" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE4 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE4" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE5 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE5" , GA.POSTCODE AS "GA.POSTCODE" , GA.PARTY_ID AS "GA.PARTY_ID" , SOLP.DX_NUMBER AS "SOLP.DX_NUMBER" , SOLP.TEL_NO AS "SOLP.TEL_NO" , SOLP.FAX_NUMBER AS "SOLP.FAX_NUMBER" , SOLP.EMAIL_ADDRESS AS "SOLP.EMAIL_ADDRESS" , CPR.PREFERRED_COMMUNICATION_METHOD AS "CPR.PREF_COMM_METHOD" , PR.PARTY_ROLE_DESCRIPTION AS "PR.PARTY_ROLE_DESCRIPTION" , CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE AS "CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE" , SOLP.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME AS "SOLP.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME" , DECODE( CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE, null, null, CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE || '_' || CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO) AS "SOL_SURROGATE_ID" , CPR.ORA_ROWSCN AS "CPR_ORA_ROWSCN" , SOLP.ORA_ROWSCN AS "SOLP_ORA_ROWSCN" , CP.ORA_ROWSCN AS "CP_ORA_ROWSCN" , PR.ORA_ROWSCN AS "PR_ORA_ROWSCN" , GA.ORA_ROWSCN AS "GA_ORA_ROWSCN" FROM CASE_PARTY_ROLES CPR , PARTIES SOLP , CODED_PARTIES CP , PARTY_ROLES PR , GIVEN_ADDRESSES GA WHERE CPR.CASE_NUMBER = ${C.CASE_NUMBER} AND CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = 'SOLICITOR' AND SOLP.PARTY_ID = CPR.PARTY_ID AND CP.PARTY_ID (+)= CPR.PARTY_ID AND PR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND GA.CASE_NUMBER IS NULL AND GA.PARTY_ROLE_CODE IS NULL AND GA.CASE_PARTY_NO IS NULL AND GA.PARTY_ID = CPR.PARTY_ID AND GA.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE = 'CODED PARTY') ORDER BY "CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO"

Query.tables: P CPR CP PR GA CPR2CPR
Query.SQL: (SELECT P.PARTY_ID AS "P.PARTY_ID" , CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO AS "CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO" , NULL AS "CP.CODE" , GA.ADDRESS_ID AS "GA.ADDRESS_ID" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE1 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE1" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE2 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE2" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE3 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE3" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE4 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE4" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE5 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE5" , GA.POSTCODE AS "GA.POSTCODE" , GA.VALID_FROM AS "GA.VALID_FROM" , GA.UPDATED_BY AS "GA.UPDATED_BY" , GA.PARTY_ID AS "GA.PARTY_ID" , P.DX_NUMBER AS "P.DX_NUMBER" , P.TEL_NO AS "P.TEL_NO" , P.FAX_NUMBER AS "P.FAX_NUMBER" , P.EMAIL_ADDRESS AS "P.EMAIL_ADDRESS" , CPR.PREFERRED_COMMUNICATION_METHOD AS "CPR.PREF_COMM_METHOD" , CPR.WELSH_INDICATOR AS "CPR.WELSH_INDICATOR" , PR.PARTY_ROLE_DESCRIPTION AS "PR.PARTY_ROLE_DESCRIPTION" , CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE AS "CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE" , P.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME AS "P.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME" , CPR.REFERENCE AS "CPR.REFERENCE" , CPR.DEFT_DATE_OF_SERVICE AS "CPR.DEFT_DATE_OF_SERVICE" , CPR.LAST_DATE_FOR_SERVICE AS "CPR.LAST_DATE_FOR_SERVICE" , CPR.DEFT_LAST_DATE_FOR_REPLY AS "CPR.DEFT_DATE_FOR_REPLY" , P.PERSON_DOB AS "P.PERSON_DOB" , CPR.CONFIDENTIAL AS "CPR.CONFIDENTIAL" , CPR.PAYEE_FLAG AS "CPR.PAYEE_FLAG" , CPR2CPR.CPR_B_CASE_PARTY_NO AS "CPR2CPR.CPR_B_CASE_PARTY_NO" , CPR2CPR.CPR_B_PARTY_ROLE_CODE AS "CPR2CPR.CPR_B_PARTY_ROLE_CODE" , CPR2CPR.PERSONAL_REFERENCE AS "CPR2CPR.PERSONAL_REFERENCE" , DECODE( CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE, null, null, CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE || '_' || CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO) AS "LITP_SURROGATE_ID" , DECODE( CPR2CPR.CPR_B_PARTY_ROLE_CODE, null, null, CPR2CPR.CPR_B_PARTY_ROLE_CODE || '_' || CPR2CPR.CPR_B_CASE_PARTY_NO) AS "LITP_SOL_SURROGATE_ID" , CPR.MEDIATION_NAME AS "CPR.MEDIATION_NAME" , CPR.MEDIATION_TEL_NO AS "CPR.MEDIATION_TEL_NO" , CPR.MEDIATION_EMAIL AS "CPR.MEDIATION_EMAIL" , CPR.MEDIATION_AVAILABILITY AS "CPR.MEDIATION_AVAILABILITY" , CPR.MEDIATION_NOTES AS "CPR.MEDIATION_NOTES" , CPR.ORA_ROWSCN AS "CPR_ORA_ROWSCN" , P.ORA_ROWSCN AS "P_ORA_ROWSCN" , NULL AS "CP_ORA_ROWSCN" , PR.ORA_ROWSCN AS "PR_ORA_ROWSCN" , GA.ORA_ROWSCN AS "GA_ORA_ROWSCN" , CPR2CPR.ORA_ROWSCN AS "CPR2CPR_ORA_ROWSCN" FROM CASE_PARTY_ROLES CPR , PARTIES P , PARTY_ROLES PR , GIVEN_ADDRESSES GA , CPR_TO_CPR_RELATIONSHIP CPR2CPR WHERE CPR.CASE_NUMBER = ${C.CASE_NUMBER} AND CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE != 'SOLICITOR' AND P.PARTY_ID = CPR.PARTY_ID AND PR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND GA.CASE_NUMBER = ${C.CASE_NUMBER} AND GA.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND GA.CASE_PARTY_NO = CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO AND GA.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE = 'SERVICE' AND GA.VALID_TO IS NULL AND CPR2CPR.CPR_A_CASE_NUMBER (+)= ${C.CASE_NUMBER} AND CPR2CPR.CPR_A_CASE_PARTY_NO (+)= CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO AND CPR2CPR.CPR_A_PARTY_ROLE_CODE (+)= CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND CPR2CPR.CPR_B_PARTY_ROLE_CODE (+)= 'SOLICITOR' AND CPR2CPR.DELETED_FLAG (+)= 'N' ) UNION ALL ( SELECT P.PARTY_ID AS "P.PARTY_ID" , CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO AS "CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO" , CP.CODE AS "CP.CODE" , GA.ADDRESS_ID AS "GA.ADDRESS_ID" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE1 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE1" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE2 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE2" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE3 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE3" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE4 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE4" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE5 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE5" , GA.POSTCODE AS "GA.POSTCODE" , GA.VALID_FROM AS "GA.VALID_FROM" , GA.UPDATED_BY AS "GA.UPDATED_BY" , GA.PARTY_ID AS "GA.PARTY_ID" , P.DX_NUMBER AS "P.DX_NUMBER" , P.TEL_NO AS "P.TEL_NO" , P.FAX_NUMBER AS "P.FAX_NUMBER" , P.EMAIL_ADDRESS AS "P.EMAIL_ADDRESS" , CPR.PREFERRED_COMMUNICATION_METHOD AS "CPR.PREF_COMM_METHOD" , CPR.WELSH_INDICATOR AS "CPR.WELSH_INDICATOR" , PR.PARTY_ROLE_DESCRIPTION AS "PR.PARTY_ROLE_DESCRIPTION" , CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE AS "CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE" , P.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME AS "P.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME" , CPR.REFERENCE AS "CPR.REFERENCE" , CPR.DEFT_DATE_OF_SERVICE AS "CPR.DEFT_DATE_OF_SERVICE" , CPR.LAST_DATE_FOR_SERVICE AS "CPR.LAST_DATE_FOR_SERVICE" , CPR.DEFT_LAST_DATE_FOR_REPLY AS "CPR.DEFT_DATE_FOR_REPLY" , P.PERSON_DOB AS "P.PERSON_DOB" , CPR.CONFIDENTIAL AS "CPR.CONFIDENTIAL" , CPR.PAYEE_FLAG AS "CPR.PAYEE_FLAG" , CPR2CPR.CPR_B_CASE_PARTY_NO AS "CPR2CPR.CPR_B_CASE_PARTY_NO" , CPR2CPR.CPR_B_PARTY_ROLE_CODE AS "CPR2CPR.CPR_B_PARTY_ROLE_CODE" , CPR2CPR.PERSONAL_REFERENCE AS "CPR2CPR.PERSONAL_REFERENCE" , DECODE( CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE, null, null, CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE || '_' || CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO) AS "LITP_SURROGATE_ID" , DECODE( CPR2CPR.CPR_B_PARTY_ROLE_CODE, null, null, CPR2CPR.CPR_B_PARTY_ROLE_CODE || '_' || CPR2CPR.CPR_B_CASE_PARTY_NO) AS "LITP_SOL_SURROGATE_ID" , CPR.MEDIATION_NAME AS "CPR.MEDIATION_NAME" , CPR.MEDIATION_TEL_NO AS "CPR.MEDIATION_TEL_NO" , CPR.MEDIATION_EMAIL AS "CPR.MEDIATION_EMAIL" , CPR.MEDIATION_AVAILABILITY AS "CPR.MEDIATION_AVAILABILITY" , CPR.MEDIATION_NOTES AS "CPR.MEDIATION_NOTES" , CPR.ORA_ROWSCN AS "CPR_ORA_ROWSCN" , P.ORA_ROWSCN AS "P_ORA_ROWSCN" , CP.ORA_ROWSCN AS "CP_ORA_ROWSCN" , PR.ORA_ROWSCN AS "PR_ORA_ROWSCN" , GA.ORA_ROWSCN AS "GA_ORA_ROWSCN" , CPR2CPR.ORA_ROWSCN AS "CPR2CPR_ORA_ROWSCN" FROM CASE_PARTY_ROLES CPR , PARTIES P , CODED_PARTIES CP , PARTY_ROLES PR , GIVEN_ADDRESSES GA , CPR_TO_CPR_RELATIONSHIP CPR2CPR WHERE CPR.CASE_NUMBER = ${C.CASE_NUMBER} AND CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE != 'SOLICITOR' AND P.PARTY_ID = CPR.PARTY_ID AND CP.PARTY_ID = CPR.PARTY_ID AND PR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND GA.CASE_NUMBER IS NULL AND GA.PARTY_ROLE_CODE IS NULL AND GA.CASE_PARTY_NO IS NULL AND GA.PARTY_ID = CPR.PARTY_ID AND GA.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE = 'CODED PARTY' AND CPR2CPR.CPR_A_CASE_NUMBER (+)= ${C.CASE_NUMBER} AND CPR2CPR.CPR_A_CASE_PARTY_NO (+)= CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO AND CPR2CPR.CPR_A_PARTY_ROLE_CODE (+)= CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND CPR2CPR.CPR_B_PARTY_ROLE_CODE (+)= 'SOLICITOR' AND CPR2CPR.DELETED_FLAG (+)= 'N') ORDER BY "CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE", "CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO"

Query.Join: GA.CASE_NUMBER = ${C.CASE_NUMBER} AND NOT GA.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = 'SOLICITOR' AND GA.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE = 'SERVICE' AND GA.VALID_TO IS NOT NULL
